title: Aechmea nudicaulis
taxonomy: Aechmea nudicaulis belongs to the family Bromeliaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as bromeliads. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, including Tillandsioideae and Bromelioideae. Aechmea nudicaulis is a species of air plant that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a type of epiphyte that grows on other plants and trees, using them for support. The classification of Aechmea nudicaulis is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Monocots, Order: Poales, Family: Bromeliaceae, Genus: Aechmea, Species: A. nudicaulis.
